GPU_Scheduling_HAGS.description: Disables GPU scheduling to eliminate video-induced DPC latency.
GPU_Scheduling_HAGS.post_start_message: [CRITICAL] HAGS is disabled. RESTART your PC now and set BIOS MUX to dGPU (PEG).
GPU_Scheduling_HAGS.post_stop_message: [CRITICAL] HAGS is enabled. RESTART your PC and set BIOS MUX to dGPU (SG).

System_Power_and_Display.description: Forces Max Performance plan, 60Hz refresh rate, and 80% static fan speed (GFBC: Fan speed not implemented, waiting for PR).

Windows_Update_and_Search_Indexer.description: Halts Windows Update and Search Indexer to prevent CPU/Disk spikes.

Network_WiFi.description: Kills wireless networking. Usually causes a lot of DPC latency.

Unnecessary_Peripherals.description: Kills Camera, Biometrics, and SD Card readers.
